name: BB:CategoryDefinition: Service DoS
notes: Edit this BB to define Denial of Service (DoS) attack events.
bb_references: BB:CategoryDefinition: Service DoS on events which are detected by the undefined system
conditions_text: where the Event Category for the event is one of the following DOS.Database DoS, DOS.DNS Service DoS, DOS.FTP DoS, DOS.Mail Service DoS, DOS.Telnet DoS, DOS.Unix DOS, DOS.Web Service DoS, DOS.Windows DoS, DOS.Brute force login, DOS.VoIP DoS
TD_list: APPLY BB:CategoryDefinition: Service DoS on events which are detected by the undefined system

AND where the Event Category for the event is one of the following DOS.Database DoS, DOS.DNS Service DoS, DOS.FTP DoS, DOS.Mail Service DoS, DOS.Telnet DoS, DOS.Unix DOS, DOS.Web Service DoS, DOS.Windows DoS, DOS.Brute force login, DOS.VoIP DoS
